codex_oauth.title: Connect ChatGPT subscription (Codex OAuth)
codex_oauth.description: DIVE calls models through your ChatGPT Plus/Pro/Team/Enterprise subscription. It's PKCE-based and works without an API key.
codex_oauth.idle_instructions: Click Start to open the ChatGPT sign-in page in your browser. After authenticating, paste the `code` and `state` from the redirect URL (`http://localhost:1455/auth/callback?...`) here.
codex_oauth.waiting_instructions: Open the auth page with the button below. Once you finish signing in, DIVE receives the callback automatically and completes the connection. Only if auto-complete doesn't happen, paste the full callback URL from the browser address bar into the code field and click Complete connection.
codex_oauth.code_placeholder: The ?code=… value from the redirect URL
codex_oauth.state_placeholder: The &state=… value from the redirect URL
codex_oauth.done_body: The token is saved in the OS keyring. You can now select the Codex provider in chat.

prompt_check.error_tool_choice: The model you selected doesn't support the pre-send check. Pick a different model, or send directly without this check.
prompt_check.error_not_configured: AI isn't connected yet. Connect an AI assistant in Settings first.
prompt_check.title: Pre-send check
prompt_check.description: AI checks your prompt for ambiguity.

prompt_helper.title: Prompt helper
prompt_helper.hint: Click a template that fits the current flow to insert it into the input. Replace the bracketed parts with your task.
prompt_helper.fallback: There's no template for this flow yet, so the full library is shown instead.

d-decompose.title: Break the goal into steps
d-decompose.body: I want to build [feature]. Break it into 3–5 roadmap steps a beginner can follow.

d-overview.title: Big picture first
d-overview.body: Map out the big picture of this project first. Summarize the key screens and data flow.

i-focus-card.title: Work on the current step only
i-focus-card.body: Work on [current step] only. Don't touch anything else.

i-io-first.title: Input/output examples first
i-io-first.body: Show me input and output examples for this part first. Then let's start the implementation.

v-verify-how.title: Ask how to verify
v-verify-how.body: How can I verify this step's behavior? Give me 3 test cases.

v-edge-cases.title: Check edge cases
v-edge-cases.body: Check whether exceptions (empty input, wrong type, network error) are handled.

e-integration-review.title: Check integration issues
e-integration-review.body: Review the whole codebase and tell me what could break on integration.

e-refactor-chances.title: Refactoring opportunities
e-refactor-chances.body: Find opportunities to reduce duplication and improve readability and performance in this code.

authoring.title: Project PRD Authoring
authoring.subtitle: Create real project criteria through a short conversation and direct editing.
authoring.interview_prompt: DIVE will keep asking useful questions until the PRD draft is ready.
authoring.interview_seed: First, who needs this, what situation are they in, and what feels difficult enough that this should exist? One sentence is enough.
authoring.turn_pending: Got it. I am folding that into the PRD draft...
authoring.turn_error_retryable: The model response was unstable for a moment. Your last thought is still here; send it again and I will continue from it.
authoring.answer_placeholder: Example: Teachers want to quickly see which student submissions are missing
authoring.goal_placeholder: The goal will appear here as the conversation clarifies.
authoring.intent_placeholder: The user's intent will be summarized here as it emerges.
authoring.scope_placeholder: In-scope work gathered from the conversation will appear here.
authoring.non_goals_placeholder: Out-of-scope boundaries will appear here when they come up.
authoring.constraints_placeholder: Runtime, UX, classroom, or delivery constraints will be collected here.
authoring.criterion_placeholder: Observable done state from the conversation
authoring.patch_applied: That part of the conversation was applied to the PRD draft.
authoring.patch_rejected: That part of the conversation was not applied directly.
authoring.patch_held: Student-edited fields stayed intact; the new suggestion was held separately.
authoring.validation_intent_required: The intent summary is still empty.
authoring.validation_criterion_required: The done criteria are still empty.
authoring.validation_goal_vague: The goal is too vague — say in one sentence who it's for and what observable result counts as done.
authoring.validation_non_goals_required: List at least one thing that is out of scope (a non-goal).
authoring.validation_criteria_insufficient: Add at least two concrete, checkable done criteria.

intent_check.title: Did the AI capture what you meant?
intent_check.prompt: This PRD is the AI's summary of your conversation. Does it match what you actually wanted? Is anything missing or off?
intent_check.message: Confirming isn't accepting the AI's summary — it's checking it against your own intent.
intent_check.guided: Tell apart the AI's summary from what you actually intended.

authoring.turn_failed_retryable_description: The AI provider is temporarily unstable. Send the same thought again and DIVE will continue shaping the PRD.
authoring.save_success_description: Use the final PRD view to create the plan from this PRD.

read_view.title: Final PRD
read_view.empty_scope: No scope has been added yet.
read_view.plan_created_description: Use the plan area to start work or add a new step.

decomposition.offer_message: You can keep working, or open a reviewable plan adjustment suggestion.

add_step.title: Add step
add_step.request_placeholder: Describe the missing work in plain language...
add_step.prefilled_from_chat: Draft filled from chat. Review before saving.
add_step.prefilled_from_request: Draft filled from your request. Review before saving.

scope_supervisor.fallback_blocked: Static scope cards are disabled; DIVE waits for supervisor evidence.

spec_conformance.runtime_gap: Unsupported runtime fallback is blocked for v2 work.
spec_conformance.scope_gap: Scope-expansion cards use the SupervisorAgent review path.
spec_conformance.rationale_gap: Rationale challenges offer a non-blocking plan adjustment.
spec_conformance.status_gap: Active specs distinguish shipped, planned, and future-reserved behavior.

rc1_migration.title: DIVE v1.0.0-rc.1 was a demo build
rc1_migration.description: It only ran the UI with no real data persistence, so previous session, project, and step data cannot be recovered.
rc1_migration.body: From v1.0.0-rc.2 on, data is actually saved to SQLite. Please re-enter your API key and create a new project.
rc1_migration.removed_heading: rc.1 demo keys cleaned up in this run
rc1_migration.apology: Sorry for the inconvenience. — The DIVE team

restore_confirm.title: Restore to checkpoint
restore_confirm.description: Your current state is auto-saved as a "just-before-restore" checkpoint, so you can undo anytime.
restore_confirm.backup_label: Auto-back up current state, then restore
restore_confirm.backup_sub: An `auto-pre-restore` checkpoint is created before restoring.
restore_confirm.backup_aria: Auto-back up current state before restoring

sidebar.delete_project_confirm: Delete this project? Only the .dive/ folder will be removed. (Your code is preserved.)

stage.banner_all_verified: All steps complete — add another step or finish the session.
stage.banner_select_card: Select a roadmap step to work on.
stage.banner_decomposed: Describe what the agent should do for this step.
stage.banner_instructed_empty: Describe what the agent should do for this step.
stage.banner_instructed: Step ready — the agent will follow your instruction.
stage.banner_rejected: Step needs changes — edit it and try again.
stage.banner_verified: Checked — inspect changes or move to the next step.
stage.gate_no_session: Choose a project and start a session before describing a goal.
stage.gate_no_provider: Connect an AI assistant before planning, roadmap creation, and step execution.
stage.gate_no_cards: Describe your goal and draft a plan before step execution.
stage.gate_no_instruction: Describe what the agent should do for this step.
stage.hint_no_instruction: Tip: describe what this step should do for a sharper result — or just start chatting.
stage.hint_plan_step_prompt: Step context is attached automatically. Use your own words; insert details only if needed.

onboarding.title: Connect your AI assistant
onboarding.description: After choosing a project folder, connect the AI assistant DIVE uses to plan, build, and check work.
onboarding.opencode_warning: Beta service · some free models may use data for training
onboarding.codex_note: DIVE opens a secure sign-in window — no API key needed.
onboarding.error_unauthorized: The key is invalid or lacks permission. ({{message}})
onboarding.error_network: Could not connect because of a network problem. ({{message}})

new_project.title: New project
new_project.description: Choose the folder to work in. DIVE will create `.dive/` inside it.
new_project.browse_unavailable: The folder picker is available in the desktop app.

settings.general_description: Change DIVE's language, theme, and guided help.
settings.guided_help_description: Show step-by-step explanations while you learn DIVE.
settings.review_cards_description: Show evidence-grounded review cards beside goals, plans, changed files, terminal errors, and verification results.
settings.review_card_mode_guided_description: Show the title, message, evidence, one-line explanation, and immediate actions.
settings.review_card_mode_work_description: Keep review cards concise and low-friction while still showing evidence and immediate actions.
settings.review_card_mode_standard_description: Show a concise message, evidence chips, and immediate actions.
settings.review_card_mode_expert_description: Hide low-risk cards, but still show high-risk changes, failed verification, AI-self-report-only approvals, and missing rollback points.
settings.ai_connection_title: Connect DIVE to an AI assistant
settings.ai_connection_description: Pick the AI connection DIVE uses for planning, coding, and checks. API keys are stored in the OS keychain.
settings.base_url_warning: Connected to a non-default AI endpoint. The API key will be sent to that server.
settings.model_saved_description: The selected model will be used from the next request.
settings.safety_description: DIVE asks before changing files, running commands, or undoing work.
settings.safety_control_description: File edits and commands wait for an approval card before they run.
settings.safety_blocked_description: Some dangerous commands cannot run even if someone clicks approve.
settings.safety_undo_description: Use Recovery & Undo in the main app to return to a saved checkpoint when one exists.
settings.reset_approvals_description: Recommended: forget advanced auto-approval shortcuts when a new session starts.
settings.advanced_description: Optional tools for experienced users. You can ignore this section at first.
settings.auto_approval_description: Advanced shortcut: only safe read tools can be auto-approved. File edits and commands still require manual approval.
settings.auto_approval_hint: Warning and danger tools always stay manual.

chat.empty_no_project_description: Pick the local folder where DIVE will plan, create a roadmap, and run step-by-step coding work.
chat.empty_no_session_description: After your AI connection is ready, describe a goal so DIVE can draft a plan and roadmap.
chat.empty_default_title: Start a session to begin chatting
chat.empty_default_description: Enter a goal or pick a roadmap step
chat.empty_hint: In the sidebar, click + New session to begin
chat.pending_approval_jump_aria: Jump to the pending tool approval card
chat.stall_timeout: The AI response stalled. Check your network or the model status, then try again.
chat.tool_approval_stale_approve: This approval request is no longer active. DIVE did not run the command.
chat.tool_approval_stale_deny: This approval request is no longer active. There is nothing left to deny.

runtime.supervised_tooltip: DIVE runs the agent in a supervised runtime. Every action it wants to take — editing files, running commands — needs your approval first. You stay in control.
runtime.selected_tooltip: This response is running through {{runtime}}. Provider: {{provider}}, model: {{model}}. Reason: {{reason}}

actions.rerouted_to_preview: DIVE did not run the command. Use Preview for this local result.
actions.stale_no_command_ran: This request is no longer active. No command ran.
actions.preview_unavailable: Preview is unavailable for this target.
actions.terminal_script_high_risk: Terminal Script is high risk and requires one-shot approval.

capability.ready_message: This provider can run through DIVE's supervised Pi runtime.
capability.unavailable_message: DIVE cannot start this turn until supervised Pi execution is available.

reasons.provider_not_pi_capable: This provider does not have confirmed Pi runtime support.
reasons.legacy_requested: A saved old-runtime request is not available for v2 work.
reasons.missing_credentials: Provider credentials are missing or unavailable.
reasons.missing_project_root: Select a project before starting work.

tool_call.denied_plan_first: This is expected during planning: file changes and commands wait until you approve a plan.
tool_call.blocked_explain: This command is blocked by the safety policy (§9.2) and cannot run, with or without your approval.

get_started.title: Get started
get_started.subtitle: Finish these 4 steps to start the project workflow.
get_started.project_desc: Pick the local folder DIVE will work in.
get_started.provider_desc: Connect the AI assistant that will handle your chats.
get_started.prd_desc: Answer a few questions and keep the live draft grounded in this project.
get_started.plan_desc: Review the saved PRD, then create a plan and begin the first work session.

decomposed.label: Waiting
decomposed.summary: Waiting for a task — click a step to start

verified.label: Done
verified.summary: Passed AI review — manual check recommended

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.summary: Verification rejected — revise the task and retry

roadmap.title: Roadmap

next_action_v2.no_steps: Describe your goal in chat to generate a roadmap.
next_action_v2.pick_step: Select a step to see its details.
next_action_v2.planned: Waiting to start. The agent will pick this up next.
next_action_v2.blocked: This step is blocked. Check dependencies or provider quota, then retry with Resume.
next_action_v2.in_progress: The agent is working on this step.
next_action_v2.review: Review the results, then approve or request changes in chat.
next_action_v2.done: Approved. Move on to the next step.

roadmap.empty_v2_description: Approve a plan in chat to see your roadmap here.

step_detail.title: Step details
step_detail.read_only_note: Read only. Make changes from chat.
step_detail.go_to_chat_hint: Reviews, edits, and approvals happen in chat.
step_detail.coach_role: This is guidance for how to verify. Approval evidence still needs an observation or passing test.
step_detail.coach_unavailable: Verification guidance is unavailable. Check the diff or record your own observation before deciding.

coach_unavailable_reason.provider_not_configured: No AI provider is configured, so DIVE could not create verification guidance. Finish the AI connection in Settings, try regenerating, or inspect the diff and record your own observation.
coach_unavailable_reason.missing_credentials: AI provider credentials are missing or unavailable, so DIVE could not create verification guidance. Reconnect the provider in Settings, try regenerating, or record what you observed directly.
coach_unavailable_reason.missing_project_root: DIVE could not identify the open project path, so it could not create verification guidance. Reopen the project or inspect the diff and record your own observation.
coach_unavailable_reason.provider_not_supported: The selected AI provider is not connected to the Pi supervised verification coach. Switch to a supported provider or record your own observation before deciding.
coach_unavailable_reason.runtime_unavailable: The AI runtime connection is unavailable, so DIVE could not create verification guidance. Check the AI connection in Settings, try regenerating, or inspect the diff and record your own observation.
coach_unavailable_reason.sidecar_unavailable: DIVE could not start the Pi sidecar executable, so it could not create verification guidance. Check that the installed app includes the runtime file, then try again or record your own observation.
coach_unavailable_reason.sidecar_error: The Pi sidecar returned an error while creating verification guidance. Try regenerating, or inspect the diff and run results directly before recording your observation.
coach_unavailable_reason.timeout: The AI runtime took too long to respond, so DIVE could not create verification guidance. Try regenerating in a moment, or inspect the diff and record your own observation.
coach_unavailable_reason.malformed_output: The AI returned guidance in the wrong format, so DIVE did not show it. Try regenerating or record your own observation before deciding.
coach_unavailable_reason.generic_guidance: The guidance was not specific enough for this step, so DIVE did not show it. Inspect the diff or run result, then record what you observed.
coach_unavailable_reason.unsupported_evidence: The guidance did not match the evidence DIVE has for this step, so it was not shown. Inspect the diff or record your own observation before deciding.
coach_unavailable_reason.unsafe_action: The guidance included an unsafe action, so DIVE did not show it. Inspect the diff or run only safe checks, then record what you observed.
coach_unavailable_reason.missing_criterion: DIVE needs a clearer completion criterion before it can create verification guidance. Refine the criterion or record your own observation before deciding.

step_detail.coach_observation_placeholder: Example: I ran pnpm test and confirmed a new item appears after clicking Save.
step_detail.coach_observation_needs_criterion: Record both an acceptance criterion and an observation for approval evidence.
step_detail.stepper_stage_code_summary_pending: Start with changed files and diff review status.
step_detail.stepper_stage_code_summary_done: Changed code has been opened for review.
step_detail.stepper_code_files: {{count}} changed file(s) — open the diff to review.
step_detail.stepper_code_high_risk: {{count}} unexpected high-risk file(s) — see details below.
step_detail.stepper_stage_observe_summary_pending: Follow the verification guidance and record criterion-linked observation.
step_detail.stepper_stage_decision_summary_needs_obs: Approval is enabled only after criterion-linked observation or verification evidence.
step_detail.stepper_stage_decision_summary_ready: Criterion-linked observation is present for the approval decision.
step_detail.review_card_hidden_evidence_count: {{count}} more evidence item(s) remain in the research log.
step_detail.review_card_hidden_action_count: {{count}} more action(s) are not shown on this card.
step_detail.review_card_reason_fallback: Leave a one-line reason before continuing.
step_detail.trust_calibration_hint: If the AI could be wrong somewhere, where would it be? Point to one spot before you decide.
step_detail.approval_prompt: The AI claims it met the intent. Do you agree after checking yourself?
step_detail.unverified_note: Not verified by external tests. Check the result yourself.
step_detail.criterion_confirm_label: I personally observed this acceptance criterion hold
step_detail.criterion_confirm_hint: After actually checking the preview or app, choose which observation this confirmation is tied to.
step_detail.decision_summary_verified: Verification evidence is present. You can approve or keep checking.
step_detail.decision_summary_deferred: Run, preview, or test verification is not available yet. You can defer verification without recording this as risk acceptance.
step_detail.decision_summary_risk: Some evidence needs attention before approval.
step_detail.decision_summary_missing: Verification evidence is limited. Check first or record the risk.
step_detail.decision_reason_unverified: No verification evidence yet — nothing run, tested, or confirmed against the acceptance criterion
step_detail.decision_reason_label: Reason for accepting the risk (one line)
step_detail.decision_reason_placeholder: Example: I checked the failure and can handle it in the next step
step_detail.decision_request_changes_note: Request changes from the verification review.
step_detail.decision_plain_approve_blocked: This state needs a short reason before risk approval.
step_detail.decision_defer_note: Deferred verification is recorded separately from risk acceptance.
step_detail.decision_stop_note: Stop: pause this step and decide the next direction again.
step_detail.bundle_diff_reviewed: Diff opened and reviewed. This is separate from passing tests.
step_detail.bundle_diff_not_reviewed: Diff has not been opened yet.
step_detail.bundle_verification_missing: No run, preview, or test evidence yet.

dashboard.title: Plan dashboard
dashboard.detail_draft: Plan draft is waiting for approval.

plan_view.empty_title: Ready to create a plan from the saved PRD
plan_view.empty_description: Generate a plan draft from the confirmed PRD, then review and approve it.

actions.locked_reason: Finish {{deps}} first to unlock this step
actions.locked_reason_generic: Unlocks once the previous step is done

interview.title: Plan interview
interview.goal_hint: Describe what you want to build in natural language.
interview.answer_hint: Answer the latest question. DIVE will ask for specifics when needed.
interview.adjust_failure_seed: Re-open the plan interview for {{title}}. The issue to resolve by narrowing scope or adjusting the plan is: {{reason}}
interview.vague_answer_error: Please be more specific about the audience, scope, success criteria, or constraints.
interview.draft_ready_description: Review the generated plan before approving it.

recovery.hints: If the model response is too long, ask only for a compact plan draft.|If it fails again, split the goal into a smaller scope.

length.title: Plan response was cut off
length.description: The model reached its token limit before finishing the plan JSON. DIVE can ask again using a shorter format.

invalid_json.title: Plan JSON could not be read
invalid_json.description: The model response was not valid JSON or was corrupted. DIVE can retry with a shorter, stricter JSON request.

invalid_plan_shape.title: Plan structure is incomplete
invalid_plan_shape.description: The JSON was readable, but it did not include the goal, intent summary, and steps DIVE needs. DIVE can regenerate a compatible structure.

approval.title: Plan draft
approval.intent_surface_description: Before approving, check what will be built and what observable result means it is done.
approval.request_changes_placeholder: Describe what should change in this draft...
approval.quick_too_large_feedback: This step feels too large for one implementation pass. Please narrow the scope or split it into smaller reviewable steps.
approval.quick_split_feedback: Please split this step into smaller steps that each have a clear result and check.
approval.quick_merge_feedback: This step seems like it could be merged with a nearby step. Please review whether the plan can be simpler.
approval.quick_criteria_feedback: Please review whether this step is linked to the right acceptance criteria.
approval.quick_unneeded_feedback: This step seems unnecessary for the current PRD. Please remove it or explain why it should stay.
approval.unresolved_warning: These items are unresolved — consider answering before approving
approval.discard_confirm_description: This plan draft and all its steps will be deleted. Your interview stays, but the draft can't be recovered.

replace.title: This project already has an approved plan
replace.description: Generating a new plan replaces the approved one and deletes its steps (chat history and checkpoints are kept). Replace it?
replace.kept_description: No new plan was created. Continue with the existing plan.

confirm.title: Review this as a possible new step?
confirm.description: Chat can suggest a step, but plan changes happen only from the dedicated add-step area.
confirm.dedicated_area_description: DIVE filled the add-step form with this draft. Save it there only after review.

recovery.title: Recovery & Undo
recovery.description: Save a safe point or undo to an earlier checkpoint if a step goes wrong.
recovery.rollback_unavailable_body: There is no checkpoint, so DIVE cannot undo the last change right now.
recovery.no_checkpoints: No checkpoints found yet. Save a recovery point before risky work.
recovery.open_session: Open a project session to enable recovery.
recovery.restore_confirm_body: DIVE will ask the backend to restore {{checkpoint}}. The checkpoint system creates a pre-restore backup first, but files in your project will change.
recovery.restore_success_description: Project files were restored and a pre-restore backup was saved. Chat history stays as the audit/research log.
recovery.restore_chat_marker: Checkpoint {{checkpoint}} restored the project files. Chat history was kept as the audit/research log.
recovery.explain_failure_prompt:
Summarize the error log for {{title}}, then propose beginner-friendly reproduction steps and the smallest check command first. Only after that, suggest a safe retry direction:
{{reason}}
recovery.rejected_reason: This step was marked as needing changes.

safe.title: Quick safety check
safe.description: This request should only read information. You still stay in control.

warn.title: Review before DIVE changes anything
warn.description: Nothing is applied until you choose Allow. Deny is always safe.

danger.title: High-risk approval required
danger.description: DIVE is asking for a powerful action. It will not run unless you allow it.

summary.files_empty: No specific file path was provided.
summary.details_aria: Expand permission card files and run context

command.title: Command to run
command.one_shot_body: This approval applies only to this exact script request and is never reused automatically.
command.change_maybe: This command might change files if the program writes to the project. DIVE will show results afterward, but it cannot promise the command is read-only.
command.change_yes: This action is expected to change project files.
command.change_no: This command is not expected to change files.
command.failure_note: If it fails, no approval is reused automatically. DIVE gets the error and can explain it.
command.deny_note: You can deny now and ask DIVE why this command is needed.

patch.title: Patch preview before approval
patch.with_diff: Review the exact before/after file change. Nothing here is applied until you allow it.
patch.missing_diff: A patch preview is not available for this request. Review the file path and raw details before deciding.

safe.label: Safe read
safe.body: This only reads project information. It should not change files or run commands.

warn.label: Needs your approval
warn.body: This may change files. Review the file path and preview before allowing it.

danger.label: Higher risk
danger.body: This can run commands or remove files. DIVE will not continue unless you explicitly allow it.

read_file.title: Read a file
read_file.body: DIVE wants to open this file so it can understand the project before acting.

list_dir.title: List files in a folder
list_dir.body: DIVE wants to see the folder names so it can choose the right next step.

search_files.title: Search project files
search_files.body: DIVE wants to search text in your project. This should not edit anything.

write_file.title: Create or replace a file
write_file.body: DIVE wants to write new content to this file. Review the preview before allowing it.

edit_file.title: Edit part of a file
edit_file.body: DIVE wants to replace matching text in this file. Review the before/after preview.

delete_file.title: Delete a file
delete_file.body: DIVE wants to remove this file from the project. Only allow this if you expected it.

mkdir.title: Create a folder
mkdir.body: DIVE wants to add a folder inside the project.

run_process.title: Run a project command
run_process.body: DIVE wants to run one program in the project folder. It may check, build, install, or generate files depending on the command.

run_terminal_script.title: Run a Terminal Script
run_terminal_script.body: DIVE wants to run shell-style verification. This is separate from Project Command, always high risk, and requires one-shot approval.

bash.title: Run a shell command
bash.body: DIVE wants to run this through the shell. Shell commands are powerful, so blocked patterns still cannot run even if approved.

default.title: Use {{toolName}}
default.body: DIVE wants to use this tool. Review the details before allowing it.

choices.deny_file_private: Deny if this file should stay private
choices.deny_folder_private: Deny if this folder should stay private
choices.deny_unnecessary_search: Deny if the search is unnecessary
choices.deny_ask_explain: Deny and ask DIVE to explain
choices.deny_ask_safer_change: Deny and ask for a safer change
choices.deny_wrong_location: Deny if the location looks wrong
choices.deny_ask_purpose: Deny and ask what it is for
choices.deny_ask_safer_command: Deny and ask for a safer command
choices.edit_if_wrong: Edit the request if the details look wrong

slide_in.hint: Code / Preview / Terminal — review the AI-created result in this panel.

no_output.title: No code output yet
no_output.description: After a step starts, DIVE will show changed files and diffs here.

blocked_no_output.title: No files were produced because the step is blocked
blocked_no_output.description: Check provider quota or dependencies, then retry from the roadmap Resume action.

code.diff_unavailable_description: This item only has a path from checkpoint or previous-version data, so line-level diff is unavailable. It is no longer shown as +0/−0.

preview.reroute_message: This is preview work, so DIVE uses Preview instead of a shell command.
preview.url_invalid: Only local http / https URLs are allowed.
preview.desktop_project_required: Select a project in the installed app before using this.
preview.installed_and_opened: Installed dependencies and opened the preview.
preview.empty_title: Choose a local URL to view the result.
preview.empty_description: If a web project server is running, you can check it directly from one of the default addresses below.

terminal.script_blocked: Terminal Script was blocked before execution.
terminal.script_unavailable: Terminal Script execution is not enabled yet.
terminal.repro_seed: Use the repeated terminal error to summarize reproduction steps, the smallest verification command, and what to inspect in the last change.
terminal.repro_status: Filled the chat composer with a reproduction-step request.
terminal.split_seed: Turn this terminal failure into a smaller single-scope request.
terminal.split_status: Filled the chat composer with a scope-reduction request.
terminal.retry_seed: Check the recovery point, reproduction steps, and scope reduction first, then retry while avoiding the same terminal failure.
terminal.retry_status: Filled the chat composer with a recovery-first retry request.
terminal.title: Terminal — {{count}} lines

toast.tutorial_description: You can change this anytime in Settings > General.
toast.issue_guidance_description: The public issue tracker is not available in this build; use the troubleshooting steps before sharing logs with your instructor or support contact.
toast.export_no_session_description: Open a project and session, then try again.
toast.export_success_description: DIVE started a JSONL download with the default anonymized settings.
toast.about_description: Desktop app for guiding a local AI coding agent through plan, run, check, and undo flows.
toast.retry_unavailable_description: DIVE could not find the last user message to resend.

auth.title: Authentication error
auth.body: Check your API key or login permission. Raw: {{message}}
auth.hints: Verify the key is correct.|Reconnect the provider in Settings.

rate_limit.title: Rate limit reached
rate_limit.body: The provider rate limit was reached. Raw: {{message}}
rate_limit.hints: Wait and retry.|Switch models in Settings or check the provider quota.|Split the task into smaller steps if needed.

network.title: Network error
network.body: Check your network connection or firewall. Raw: {{message}}
network.hints: Confirm internet access.|If behind a proxy/VPN, ask an admin to allow the API domains.

assistant_length.title: Response was cut off
assistant_length.body: The model reached its output limit before finishing the response.
assistant_length.hints: Retry with a shorter response request.|If this happened during plan generation, use compact JSON regeneration.

tool_blocked.title: Blocked by safety policy
tool_blocked.body: DIVE blocked a risky or out-of-project operation. Raw: {{message}}
tool_blocked.hints: Make sure the command stays inside the project folder.|Break risky commands into safer smaller steps.

verify_fail.title: Verification failed
verify_fail.body: Review the check output and adjust the step or test command. Raw: {{message}}
verify_fail.hints: Read stdout/stderr first.|Undo the step and make the task more specific if needed.

unknown.title: Error
unknown.hints: Read the raw message and retry.
